agency.reason: Persistent governed cases and scoped member dispatch are a core orchestration workflow.
agency.improvement: Prove the agent decision plus durable state transition as one replayable path.

audit-receipt.reason: Authority-versus-evidence judgment is specialized governance work, not generic review.
audit-receipt.improvement: Bind the audit artifact to native receipt verification evidence and add a realistic contract trial.

brand-voice.reason: A bounded reusable voice packet improves every downstream content skill and is explicitly part of the Runx context model.
brand-voice.improvement: Forward-test the packet across multiple downstream writing tasks.

business-ops.reason: This is featured dogfood for routing a business signal through governed lanes and durable state, with truthful capability metadata and deterministic route/readback proof.

charge.reason: Provider-side paid-call governance is a canonical payment capability.
charge.improvement: Replace agent-authored settlement claims with deterministic price, credential, forwarding, and receipt stages.

chief-of-staff.reason: Mailbox and calendar synthesis is a recurring executive workflow with a durable action packet.
chief-of-staff.improvement: Add bounded mailbox/calendar source adapters or make supplied-source provenance explicit, then forward-test action quality.

content-pipeline.reason: Research-to-publication packaging is a core content and distribution workflow.
content-pipeline.improvement: Bind each phase to source and review artifacts, then add an approved publication handoff rather than claiming delivery.

cve-audit.reason: Exact-version OSV verification is deterministic, reproducible, and independently proven.

data-store.reason: Provider-neutral reads and durable state transitions are foundational Runx operations with broad consumers.

deep-research.reason: A source-backed deep-research brief is a valuable durable and distributable artifact.
deep-research.improvement: Strengthen source provenance, citation verification, bounded agent phases, and final artifact acceptance evidence.

dispute-respond.reason: Receipt-linked dispute preparation is specialized payment operations work.
dispute-respond.improvement: Add evidence completeness checks and keep response preparation separate from provider filing.

ecosystem-brief.reason: Ecosystem briefs are strategic research artifacts with distribution and decision value.
ecosystem-brief.improvement: Differentiate the brief contract from generic research and prove source freshness plus review packaging.

evolve.reason: Governed repository evolution compresses a fragile multi-phase engineering workflow.
evolve.improvement: Add an isolated phase-state, refusal, and recovery proof.

extract.reason: Schema-validated extraction with digest provenance is a deterministic and independently proven capability.

ghostwrite.reason: Publication-ready writing from evidence and operator intent creates a reusable viral artifact consumed across the catalog.
ghostwrite.improvement: Preserve provenance through revisions and prove the handoff into a separate governed publication lane.

github-sync.reason: Bounded GitHub synchronization is a high-value provider operation.
github-sync.improvement: Replace plan-only closure with scoped provider reads/writes, approval gates, idempotency, and provider readback.

governed-outbound.reason: Source gathering, privacy scrubbing, approval, and outward handoff form a distinctive trust-boundary workflow.
governed-outbound.improvement: Make every fetch, scrub, send, and seal claim resolve to a deterministic or provider-backed stage.

helpdesk.reason: The published and dogfooded support classifier has truthful capability metadata, a verified deterministic runner, and a human-gated send boundary.

issue-intake.reason: Turning noisy requests into bounded change artifacts and explicit lanes is recurring operator work, with truthful metadata and four replayable intake-contract cases.

issue-to-pr.reason: The scafld, filesystem, git, and outbox composition is a core developer workflow.
issue-to-pr.improvement: Add a standalone proof for the native boundaries while keeping authoring judgments explicit.

issue-triage.reason: Provider-grounded issue assessment and response preparation is distinct from intake and implementation.
issue-triage.improvement: Make provider reads the default evidence path and prove draft-versus-mutation separation.

knowledge-router.reason: It now owns a distinct knowledge-catalog contract and deterministically rejects invented source, owner, and follow-up skill references before sealing a route.

lead-enrichment.reason: A reviewable lead intelligence packet is a core growth artifact and feeds downstream outreach.
lead-enrichment.improvement: Add declared enrichment sources or precisely label supplied-signal synthesis, provenance, confidence, and freshness.

lead-router.reason: Governed lead qualification and routing is a core growth workflow.
lead-router.improvement: Bind qualification evidence to deterministic route choices and downstream Nitrosend or hold receipts.

least-privilege.reason: Comparing grants with actual sealed usage is a distinctive Runx governance operation.
least-privilege.improvement: Add direct ledger-backed proof rather than relying on caller summaries.

ledger.reason: Cross-run receipt queries and chain verification are canonical Runx capabilities.
ledger.improvement: Make the default runner query and verify the ledger directly, then prove pagination and broken-chain cases.

messageboard.reason: The messageboard is the documented domain workflow for governed transitions, durable state, moderation, and payout authorization.
messageboard.improvement: Add one end-to-end durable transition proof without changing its core ownership.

mock-charge.reason: Deterministic charge fixture retained for canonical payment integration and recovery tests.

mock-pay.reason: Deterministic payment fixture retained for canonical payment integration and recovery tests.

mock-refund.reason: Deterministic refund fixture retained for canonical payment integration and recovery tests.

moltbook.reason: Moltbook opportunity and publication artifacts are a direct ecosystem distribution surface for Runx.
moltbook.improvement: Add real bounded scan and post provider adapters, explicit approval, idempotency, and published-post readback.

mpp-charge.reason: MPP provider rail retained behind canonical payment skills.

mpp-pay.reason: MPP provider rail retained behind canonical payment skills.

mpp-refund.reason: MPP provider rail retained behind canonical payment skills.

n8n-handoff.reason: A scoped idempotent n8n handoff is a real integration boundary.

nitrosend.reason: The unified Nitrosend domain skill has isolated adapter trials and sealed live read-only provider evidence.

nws-weather-forecast.reason: The NWS skill performs bounded keyless provider reads with live HTTP proof.

open-meteo-weather-forecast.reason: The Open-Meteo skill performs global keyless forecast and air-quality reads with live HTTP proof.

operator-inbox.reason: A provider-neutral durable local action queue is a proven core operator primitive.

ops-desk.reason: The operator desk is the agent-facing control layer that diagnoses, routes, gates, and verifies project work.
ops-desk.improvement: Prove one full projection-to-dispatch-to-receipt lifecycle without implicit agent spawning.

overlay.reason: Digest-pinned governed overlays are unique Runx ecosystem functionality.
overlay.improvement: Replace proposal-only generation with deterministic packaging and validation proof.

policy-author.reason: Compiling plain-English governance into validated Runx policy is core builder work.
policy-author.improvement: Add deterministic schema and fail-closed policy linting after agent authorship.

pr-review-note.reason: The MCP-backed review-note lane demonstrates real scoped read/comment/refusal behavior.
pr-review-note.improvement: Bind it to a production-capable GitHub provider surface or clearly preserve it as the canonical MCP review-note pattern.

prior-art.reason: Catalog comparison and reuse decisions prevent duplicate skills and are explicitly required by the first-party contribution model.
prior-art.improvement: Bind findings to inspected catalog and repository sources.

redact-pii.reason: Fail-closed personal-data scrubbing is a core trust-boundary capability.
redact-pii.improvement: Add a deterministic scanner and adversarial leakage fixtures before claiming content is safe to cross a boundary.

reflect-digest.reason: Cross-run aggregation of repeated reflection signals is distinct from reviewing or repairing one skill run.
reflect-digest.improvement: Prove durable history reads, signal grouping, and bounded handoff into skill-lab improve without duplicating single-run diagnosis.

refund.reason: Receipt-linked refund execution is a canonical payment operation.
refund.improvement: Replace agent-authored settlement stages with deterministic rail execution, recovery, and readback.

release.reason: Prepare, gate, publish, and verify is a flagship operator workflow, not a generic prompt.
release.improvement: Use project-owned release profiles and deterministic publish/readback stages; keep model work to notes and decisions.

research.reason: Bounded source-backed research is the reusable evidence primitive consumed by deep-research and specialist briefing composites.
research.improvement: Add real bounded source bindings, citation verification, and a stable provenance packet for downstream composites.

review-receipt.reason: Diagnosing one receipt or harness failure is distinct from authority auditing and from generating a repair.
review-receipt.improvement: Bind diagnosis to native receipt verification and emit a stable failure packet consumed by skill-lab improve.

review-skill.reason: It is the canonical skill evaluation surface: native inspection and safe harness evidence feed a separate bounded assessment runner without publication or mutation claims.

run-history.reason: Read-only analysis of Runx's own receipt history is a native observability capability.
run-history.improvement: Query history directly and emit deterministic aggregates before any agent interpretation.

sandbox-harden.reason: A least-privilege hardening profile is a specialized security artifact.
sandbox-harden.improvement: Validate generated profiles against native sandbox constraints with adversarial fixtures.

send-as.reason: Provider-neutral message authorization is a canonical governance workflow consumed by delivery adapters.
send-as.improvement: Keep planning separate from delivery and require downstream provider evidence for sent status.

settle-invoice.reason: Invoice validation and authority planning form a distinct public facade that delegates actual payment execution to spend.
settle-invoice.improvement: Prove invoice evidence validation and an explicit receipt-bound handoff into spend without claiming that planning moved money.

sign-receipt.reason: Evidence-bound attestation and signing are native Runx capabilities.
sign-receipt.improvement: Invoke the real signing boundary and verify the resulting receipt rather than returning only a prepared plan.

skill-lab.reason: The canonical Runx authoring surface now owns design, bounded package writes, improvement, harness authoring, native inspection, and safe replay without a redundant proposal-publication lane.
skill-lab.improvement: Add a replayable approved workspace-write fixture for build, improve, and harness runners, then prove an execute-capable package through a separately approved sandbox test.

slack-notify.reason: A governed Slack notification is a valuable branded provider operation.
slack-notify.improvement: Replace plan-only output with bounded connector execution, approval, idempotency, and message readback.

sourcey.reason: Sourcey combines specialized authoring with real build, verify, package, and filesystem operations.
sourcey.improvement: Make deterministic build and verification primary and keep authoring acts explicit and bounded.

spend.reason: Governed outbound payment is a canonical Runx operation.
spend.improvement: Make quote, reservation, fulfillment, recovery, and proof deterministic across selected rails.

sql-analyst.reason: A reviewable SQL plan grounded in schema and samples is specialized data work.
sql-analyst.improvement: Add dialect/schema validation and an optional governed data-store execution handoff without silently running raw SQL.

stripe-charge.reason: Stripe charge rail retained behind canonical payment skills.

stripe-pay.reason: Stripe payment is a valuable branded rail behind canonical spend.
stripe-pay.improvement: Prove a safe sandbox quote-to-readback path with no agent-authored settlement claim.

stripe-refund.reason: Stripe refund rail retained behind canonical payment skills.

taste-profile.reason: A scoped taste packet is reusable context explicitly supported by the Runx skill model.
taste-profile.improvement: Forward-test consistent downstream choices across multiple artifact skills.

twitter.reason: The skill has real bounded Twitter read and action tools plus replay/refusal fixtures.
twitter.improvement: Capture live read-only provider evidence before treating provider execution as fully proven.

vault-unseal.reason: A scoped time-bounded unseal request is meaningful governance even before the vault rail acts.
vault-unseal.improvement: Label request preparation as plan completion and add a separate real vault execution adapter.

vuln-disclosure.reason: Governed advisory publication is the deliberate third stage of the security lifecycle.
vuln-disclosure.improvement: Preserve the cve-audit to triage evidence chain and add an approval-gated publication provider with readback.

vuln-triage.reason: Risk assessment and remediation guidance are the deliberate agent-judgment stage between detection and disclosure.
vuln-triage.improvement: Bind every finding to verified CVE evidence, confidence, and explicit escalation criteria.

weather-forecast.reason: Provider-neutral normalization turns raw weather evidence into an action-safe forecast packet.
weather-forecast.improvement: Replace free-form normalization with deterministic packet validation while retaining uncertainty and stop-condition judgment.

web-fetch.reason: Allowlisted fetch with digest provenance is a genuine network operation with live keyless proof.

work-plan.reason: Governed decomposition is a reusable public planning primitive consumed by skill authoring and repository evolution workflows.
work-plan.improvement: Prove a stable plan packet and forward-test it across skill-lab design and evolve without absorbing either composite.

x402-pay.reason: x402 payment is a strategically important branded rail behind canonical spend.
x402-pay.improvement: Rebuild on deterministic spend stages and prove a bounded testnet quote, settlement, and readback path.

zapier-handoff.reason: A scoped idempotent Zapier handoff is a real integration boundary.
